value.title: Assessing the Life Cycle Sustainability of Solar Energy Production ...
value.content: This paper attempts to start with life cycle sustainability assessment (LCSA) and study the status quo of its three pillars.

value.title: A review of Safety, Health and Environmental (SHE) issues of solar ...
value.content: # A review of Safety, Health and Environmental (SHE) issues of solar energy system. However like other power generation sources, solar energy has also some Safety, Health and Environmental (SHE) concerns. However like other power generation sources, solar energy has also some Safety, Health and Environmental (SHE) concerns, which needs to be addressed. Carbon emission is highest in solar PV cells in comparison to other solar energy approach. ### Environmental impacts of utility-scale solar energy. ### Review on life cycle assessment of energy payback and greenhouse gas emission of solar photovoltaic systems. ### Environmental impacts from the solar energy technologies. Technology roadmap: solar photovoltaic energy. Thin film and organic PV: new applications for solar energy. * ### Environmental impacts of solar energy systems: A review. This study reviews the sources of energy-related emissions, risks of climate change, global solar energy potential, sustainability indicators of renewable energies, environmental impacts of fossil fuels and renewable energies, benefits of solar energy utilization.
